name: mojo-extensor-bfloat16-io-fix
description: Fix ExTensor _set_float64/_get_float64 silent failures for bfloat16 dtype by adding SIMD[DType.bfloat16, 1] branches and correcting _get_dtype_size_static. Use when: (1) ExTensor bfloat16 tensors read back zeros after _set_float64 writes, (2) auditing dtype round-trip support across float16/bfloat16/int8/float32/float64, (3) _get_dtype_size_static returns wrong byte count for a dtype causing offset corruption.
